name: Convertisseur Energie
desc: Calculez 1 kWh = 3,600,000 J = 3,600 kJ = 860.4 kcal. Exemple: 5 kWh = 5 kWh = 18,000 kJ = 4,302 kcal = 17,065 BTU. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
